title: Multiple-choice cloze
description: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.

content.text: Among the many fields transformed by artificial intelligence, ecology is perhaps one of the most unexpected. Early attempts to use algorithms to track animal populations (0) limited success, mainly due to the poor quality of available data.||Today, however, high-resolution satellite imagery and automated sensors have allowed scientists to (1) far more accurate models. These systems can detect subtle environmental changes that would otherwise go (2) by human observers. As a result, conservationists are increasingly able to (3) threats before they escalate.||Still, the integration of AI into ecological research is not without controversy. Some critics argue that relying too heavily on automated predictions may (4) researchers from engaging directly with natural habitats. Others worry that the technology could (5) biases if the data used to train the models is incomplete.||Despite these concerns, many experts believe that AI has the potential to (6) traditional conservation methods rather than replace them. By combining computational insights with fieldwork, scientists can (7) a more holistic understanding of ecosystems. Ultimately, the challenge lies in ensuring that technological innovation (8) with ecological responsibility.

example.explanation: “Achieved success” es la colocación correcta. Las otras no encajan con 'success' en este contexto.

questions.explanation: La respuesta pensada es 'devise models'. Se ha movido a la opción D. Las otras no significan 'crear/diseñar modelos'.
La correcta es 'overlooked', ahora en la B. Es la única que forma la expresión idiomática 'go overlooked'.
La respuesta original 'anticipate threats' se ha colocado en la C. Las demás no expresan prever riesgos.
La correcta es 'detach researchers from', ahora en la D. Las otras requieren otras preposiciones o no encajan semánticamente.
La respuesta pensada es 'amplify biases', movida a la D. Las otras no forman colocaciones naturales con 'biases'.
La correcta es 'complement methods', ahora en la B. Las demás contradicen el sentido del texto.
La respuesta original 'foster a holistic understanding' se ha movido a la D. Las otras no encajan con 'understanding'.
La correcta es 'aligns with responsibility', ahora en la B. Las demás no forman expresiones idiomáticas válidas.
